recommendations.title: Targets
recommendations.overview: An aging horror-movie icon's fate intersects with that of a seemingly ordinary young man on a psychotic shooting spree around Los Angeles.

recommendations.title: Paperman
recommendations.overview: An urban office worker finds that paper airplanes are instrumental in meeting a girl in ways he never expected.

recommendations.title: The Cameraman
recommendations.overview: A photographer takes up newsreel shooting to impress a secretary.

recommendations.title: Griff the Invisible
recommendations.overview: Griff, office worker by day, superhero by night, has his world turned upside down when he meets Melody, a beautiful young scientist who shares his passion for the impossible.

recommendations.title: Bandits
recommendations.overview: After escaping from prison, Joe and Terry go on a crime spree, robbing banks through Oregon and California in order to finance their scheme for a new life south of the border. Unfortunately, things get more complicated when they meet Kate, who runs i

recommendations.title: Island of Death
recommendations.overview: A British couple on a break on a small Greek Island spreads terror beyond anything the Islanders could ever have imagined, only stopping every once in a while to shag anything that moves, be it man, woman or animal. But will they go unpunished, or wi

recommendations.title: Kong: Skull Island
recommendations.overview: Explore the mysterious and dangerous home of the king of the apes as a team of explorers ventures deep inside the treacherous, primordial island.

recommendations.title: Badlands
recommendations.overview: An impressionable teenage girl from a dead-end town and her older greaser boyfriend embark on a killing spree in the South Dakota badlands.

recommendations.title: I'm Not Ashamed
recommendations.overview: Based on the journal entries of Rachel Joy Scott, the first student killed in the Columbine High School shooting in 1999.

recommendations.title: The Kings of Summer
